RMINC 2.0.0.0
  • Reference

Voxel Atlas Definitions

Source: R/RMINC.R
voxel_atlas_defs.Rd

Voxel based analyses often require an atlas to differentiate voxels by structure membership. In conjunction with the atlas, a set of atlas definitions allow you to calculate summaries by region for measures and statistics of interest. For example the defs argument of anatGetAll is a character vector pointing to atlas definitions.

Details

the basic format for voxel atlas definitions is a 3-column csv file. The file should be formatted like:

Structureright.labelleft.label
amygdala51151
anterior commisure: pars anterior115215

The csv file may contain additional columns, but the three columns above must by present with names spelling/case sensitive. Additional columns may include a tissue.type column which is used in some functions.

Developed by Jason Lerch, Chris Hammill, Matthijs van Eede, Daniel Cassel.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
